title: Food Plus
description: Experience a lot of new food!
body:
Experience new food and plant tipes.

Here are the features:
- First, we added tomato and cucumber bushes which spawn in forests and each can be eaten.
- You can turn each of them into seeds to farm it.
  
  ![seed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f077cbfea9af3bc1d8d11926d48a06d061574725.png)
  ![seed 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e75506c8efacce3d0574329cceb94420afd7357.png)
- With tomatoes, bowls and cucumbers you can make salad & if you add cooked chicken you can make chicken salad!

  ![salad](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10e8618b8f0a612e878b021e699dcf47d6d1a8e0.png)
  ![salad 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2496fae51bcd0433c1b6e636d14bbc72f870769.png)
- Unrealated, you can make popsicles! You can craft it with a stick, ice and sweet berries or mellons.
  
  ![popsicle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/445ceb2f63c00cd94ccbe66a4e1c9863b756e51e.png)
  ![popsicle 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/beea32f64c1b1fc7f8410e762f3a3219c664893e.png)
- You can also make a Golden Watermelon Popsicle which has realy high saturation
  
  ![g popsicle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/978e12752272481400aa80502efc20a2f54d31ab.png)

  
  I recommend you to try it all and find what's good for you. 

also, try my other mods [Youtubers](https://modrinth.com/mod/youtubers) which adds your favorite youtubers to minecraft and [Rick's Roll](https://modrinth.com/mod/ricks-roll) which is definetlly not a rickroll.
